login.tagline: The community of the historic Fontanin spring — a place, a story, real people.
login.disclaimer: By signing in you agree to join the experimental community of Fine di Mondo APS
login.footer: Fine di Mondo APS · Tax code 04729370231

home.empty_posts_sub: Be the first to write on the forum
home.offline: You're offline — some content may be outdated

events.title: Events
events.qr_sub: Show this code at the event entrance

bar.title: Fontanin Bar
bar.intro: Every drink at the bar is a contribution in F points to the community. Pick what you're having.
bar.support_link: Want to contribute with a bank transfer too? Support the community →

dona.title: Support the community
dona.intro: A direct bank transfer, no fees: scan the code with your banking app, the details fill in themselves.
dona.not_configured: IBAN not configured yet. Ask a coordinator to enable the donation QR.

guide.title: Quick guide
guide.intro: How Il Fontanin works, section by section.

sections.title: Home
sections.body: Your board: the latest forum posts and the next scheduled event, all at a glance.

sections.title: Forum
sections.body: Community discussions organized by category. Members can start new threads and reply.

sections.title: Chat
sections.body: Real-time messaging rooms: public, private, or tied to an event.

sections.title: Events
sections.body: Calendar of clean-up days, meetups and activities. Register and show your QR at the entrance.

sections.title: Bar and F points
sections.body: Every drink at the bar is a contribution in F points to the community, tracked on your profile.

sections.title: Support the community
sections.body: Want to contribute with a bank transfer? Scan the QR with your banking app: no fees.

sections.title: Changing language
sections.body: Tap the language icon at the top to pick any of the available languages at any time.
